Video.summary: Britain during the age of Queen Victoria embodies the modern paradoxes with which we still deal.
Video.grandparentTitle: Victorian Britain
Video.title: The Victorian Paradox

Video.summary: The teenage girl who ascended the throne upon her uncle's death had never expected to become queen.
Video.grandparentTitle: Victorian Britain
Video.title: Victoria's Early Reign - 1837-1861

Video.summary: Political stability and improved farming methods helped make Britain the world's first industrial country.
Video.grandparentTitle: Victorian Britain
Video.title: The Industrial Revolution - 1750-1830

Video.summary: Where were the first railways in Britain built? What other advances in transport did they help lead to?
Video.grandparentTitle: Victorian Britain
Video.title: Railways and Steamships

Video.summary: The Reform Act of 1832 abolished many old constituencies'and created new ones.
Video.grandparentTitle: Victorian Britain
Video.title: Parliamentary Reform and Chartism

Video.summary: Courtship, marriage, and motherhood were central for women from the higher classes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Victorian Britain
Video.title: The Upper- and Middle-Class Woman

Video.summary: The stark contrasts in Victorian life are apparent in the lives of the poorer majority of women.
Video.grandparentTitle: Victorian Britain
Video.title: The Working-Class Woman

Video.summary: Britain's established church faced diverse challenges from new ideas and social conditions.
Video.grandparentTitle: Victorian Britain
Video.title: The State Church and Evangelical Revival

Image.alt: The State Church and Evangelical Revival
The State Church and Evangelical Revival
The State Church and Evangelical Revival

Video.summary: From thousand-year-old castles to contemporary art museums, look at the scope of all Britain has to offer.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: England, Scotland, and Wales
Video.title: Welcome to Britain

Video.summary: Consider visiting other ancient ruins from prehistoric Britain, such as Avebury or Maiden Castle.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: England, Scotland, and Wales
Video.title: Prehistoric Britain

Video.summary: Consider the impact of the Roman conquest in the first century B.C.E. on Great Britain.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: England, Scotland, and Wales
Video.title: Roman Britain

Video.summary: With the help of the Venerable Bede and other contemporary sources, explore the Anglo-Saxon conquests.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: England, Scotland, and Wales
Video.title: Anglo-Saxon and Viking Britain

Video.summary: Survey the development of castles built between 1066 and 1500.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: England, Scotland, and Wales
Video.title: Britain's Medieval Castles

Video.summary: Explore the major milestones in cathedral architecture.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: England, Scotland, and Wales
Video.title: Britain's Medieval Cathedrals

Video.summary: Witness how architecture from Tudor-era Britain reflect the severe political turmoil of the period.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: England, Scotland, and Wales
Video.title: Tudor Britain

Video.summary: Enjoy a intriguing study of the political shifts during Renaissance Britain.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: England, Scotland, and Wales
Video.title: Magna Carta and Civil War

Video.summary: Define key terms and outline some problems that develop when studying classical mythology.
Video.grandparentTitle: Classical Mythology
Video.title: Introduction to Classical Mythology

Video.summary: What do the most influential theorists say about the origin, nature, and function of myth?
Video.grandparentTitle: Classical Mythology
Video.title: What Is Myth?

Video.summary: Continue examining ideas about myth, including theories of Sigmund Freud and Joseph Campbell.
Video.grandparentTitle: Classical Mythology
Video.title: Why Is Myth?

Video.summary: How does Hesiod's creation story compare with the version in Ovid's Metamorphoses?
Video.grandparentTitle: Classical Mythology
Video.title: First Was Chaos

Video.summary: Consider the imaginary lives of ordinary people who lived on the other side of history.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Taking on the Other Side of History

Image.alt: Taking on the Other Side of History
Taking on the Other Side of History
Taking on the Other Side of History

Video.summary: Take a look at the lives of our ancestors, from ancient hominids to Homo erectus to the earliest humans.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Being Paleolithic

Video.summary: Step into the world's earliest permanent settlement: the river banks in Mesopotamia.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Living in Mesopotamia

Video.summary: Travel to the world's first Western civilization and explore everyday life during the New Kingdom era.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Being Egyptian
